description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat and slightly sloped roof, surrounded by a low white fence and a gated driveway. The front facade features large floor-to-ceiling windows, providing ample natural light to the main living area, and a secure metal gate with stone pillars. A red car is parked in the driveway, which is enclosed by the front gate. The upper story has a beige exterior and a balcony with double glass doors and a simple railing. The house is set on a small green lawn, with a side door and outdoor lighting fixtures visible. The overall design is clean and functional, with minimal decorative elements and a focus on geometric lines.
description: A modern two-story house with large front windows, a gated driveway, and a balcony above. The exterior features a mix of beige and white walls, a flat roof, and a small fenced lawn.
description_view_0: Front view showing the gated driveway, red car, large glass windows, and main entrance behind the fence.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the upper balcony with double doors, flat roof, and the back section of the house.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the plain beige and white walls, with minimal window or door features visible.
description_view_3: Side view with a white fence, side door, outdoor lights, and a partial view of the driveway and car.
attribute_window_arrangement: large picture windows on the front, minimal windows elsewhere
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway behind a metal gate, with large glass doors and no porch or steps, flanked by stone pillars.
